questions.text: What is the primary advantage of the Plan-and-Solve approach over recursive task-queue planning?
options: It reduces intermediate replanning token costs by establishing a structured execution blueprint upfront.
It is immune to logical errors.
It eliminates the need for tool declarations.
questions.correct_answer: It reduces intermediate replanning token costs by establishing a structured execution blueprint upfront.
questions.explanation: Plan-and-Solve drafts a static list of actions first, avoiding the overhead of running planning prompts at every single loop iteration.
